components.tenant_fields: TenantFieldPanel renders tenant metadata fields with status/source/writer/confidence/trace/evidence and safe_mode/metadata_missing badges.
components.universal_trace: UniversalTracePanel composes DecisionTimeline, ToolCards, StateWriterCards, GuardCards, PipelineCard and BusinessEventCards.
components.fallback: If tenant_domain_contract exists but metadata is missing, ContactPanel shows metadata_missing and only basic fields. Legacy canonical fields are limited to conversations without tenant_domain_contract.
